message: The review-fix write-stage transport test only runs codex, leaving the required claude ACP review-fix path untested for ReadOnly=false, non-nil WritePathAllowed, model/effort propagation, and no CLI args.
evidence: TestReviewFixPassesModelSpecAndStaysWriteStage configures agentRegistryEntry{Name: "codex"} and invokes review fix run --agent codex; the only claude review-fix coverage found is dry-run artifact validation in internal/app/review_test.go, not the runtime transport request.

message: User-facing docs still document the removed Claude CLI transport path. The code now makes the built-in Claude descriptor ACP-only with no CLI command or args, but docs still say Claude runs via `claude -p` under CLI transport.
evidence: internal/agents/config.go:52-56 removes Claude Command/Args and internal/agents/dryrun.go:11-20 skips CLI command construction for ACP-only agents. docs/agents.md:11-18, docs/agents.md:190-191, README.md:56-59, docs/install.md:21-22, and docs/cost-budget-design.md:52 still describe `claude -p` as an active execution path.
